findings.title: Search page shows no vehicles by default
findings.description: Empty search page shows 0 vehicle cards. Should show featured/recent vehicles to give users something to explore. Users with no specific query see a blank results area.

findings.title: Search filter panel missing price filter
findings.description: No price filter visible on search page. Users cannot filter by budget — a primary use case. File: nuke_frontend/src/pages/Search.tsx or src/components/search/

findings.title: Search filter panel missing year filter
findings.description: No year filter visible. Year range is a fundamental filter for collector car search.

findings.title: Vehicle profile missing tabs (Overview/Timeline/Evidence/Comps)
findings.description: Only 0 tabs found: . Expected at least Overview, Timeline, Evidence, Comps.

findings.title: Vehicle profile Overview tab missing Nuke Estimate
findings.description: No "Nuke estimate" or "estimate" text visible on vehicle profile. This is a core value prop — should be prominent.

findings.title: VIN not visible on vehicle profile
findings.description: VIN field not shown on vehicle overview. For collector vehicles, VIN is fundamental provenance data.

findings.title: Deal score not visible on vehicle overview tab
findings.description: Deal score not detected on vehicle profile — this is a key differentiator that should be shown.

findings.title: Timeline tab not clickable or not found
findings.description: Could not find Timeline tab button to click on vehicle profile page

findings.title: Comps tab not found on vehicle profile
findings.description: Could not find Comps/Comparables tab button — tab may not exist or have different label

findings.title: Evidence tab not found on vehicle profile
findings.description: Could not find Evidence tab button

findings.title: Market Exchange shows no market data
findings.description: No price data ($), fund info, or NAV on market page. Backend was built but frontend may not be connected.

findings.title: Investor offering page shows no live stats
findings.description: No $ figures or numeric stats visible on offering page. Live stats (vehicles, data points, etc.) should be shown.

findings.title: Organizations page shows no org links
findings.description: Cannot navigate to any org profile from /organizations page

findings.title: JS console errors on organizations-list

findings.title: Mobile nav hamburger menu not found
findings.description: No hamburger/menu button found for mobile navigation. At 375px, nav items will overflow. File: nuke_frontend/src/components/layout/

findings.title: Search filters missing: Make, Year, Price
findings.description: Key filter dimensions not visible: Make, Year, Price. Users cannot refine results by these critical attributes. File: nuke_frontend/src/pages/Search.tsx or src/components/search/
